raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California's proposals on gas prices are based on a demonstrably false narrative.",
    "California is a fuel island, one refinery outage away from being unable to meet the needs of Californians.",
    "Governor Newsom's proposals could cause fuel shortages and increase gas prices.",
    "Californians pay more than any other state for gas and electricity.",
    "Governor Newsom's regulations and taxes contribute to high gas prices.",
    "Lowering the cost of fuel is an issue for single mothers and small business owners affected by high gas prices."
  ]
}
```
